creator: dd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-doc->nik

nik imported iso639. 
Nik: This new version has a different format.  It includes the bibliographic 
and terminology codes, which makes the entire thing four columns, with the 
real name being the fourth column.  If you imported the original with the 
intention that computers should parse it, we probably don't want to import 
this.  If your intention was for humans to parse it, then this would be a 
welcome addition (more information plus more languages). 

If you think it should be imported but don't have time, I can do it for you.
